name: usmle-ai-exam-prep
description: AI-powered USMLE exam prep — Cloudflare Workers + Pages + D1

scripts.db:stats: wrangler d1 execute usmle-sessions --command "SELECT * FROM v_step_stats" --remote
scripts.db:hard: wrangler d1 execute usmle-sessions --command "SELECT * FROM v_subject_stats ORDER BY pct_correct ASC LIMIT 10" --remote
